name: apodictic
description: APODICTIC: anotherpanacea's Development Editor. Developmental editing that listens before diagnosing. Provides structural diagnosis, genre calibration, tag audits, plot architecture analysis, revision coaching, pre-writing pathway, and intake routing across 11 core passes, 18 specialized audits, 3 tag audits, 4 research modes, 1 pre-writing pathway, and 1 intake router.
